title: WarpOS Release Capsule
description: Self-contained snapshot of one WarpOS release — framework manifest, migrations, checksums, changelog. Phase 4A artifact.

minUpgradeableFrom.description: Lowest version from which a clean update path exists. null on the baseline release.

requiresFreshInstallFromBelow.description: Anything below this version must do a fresh install — no migration path. null if none.

postUpdateChecks.description: Slash commands or scripts that must run successfully after applying the update.

checksumsFile.description: Relative path to checksums.json inside the capsule.
